prompt: Generate all 8 wall IDs for a T-shaped building with correct inch coordinates, directions, extensions, and dormer truss cut specification.

assertions.text: Exactly 8 walls are defined (T-shape uses 8 per the skill's wall count table)
All coordinates are in inches (40 ft = 480 in, 20 ft = 240 in, 24 ft = 288 in, 5.5 in depth)
Corner overlap extensions accounted for: sheathing/drywall extensions offset by wall depth (5.5 in) at shared corners
ext_dir values are correctly assigned (+1 or -1) based on which side of each wall faces the exterior
Dormer cut range calculated from center of top bar (240 in from left) ± half dormer width, with affected truss indices identified
T-junction walls (where stem meets top bar) correctly handled — interior/exterior flags set appropriately
